description: This source file defines the ApiClient class in Kotlin, responsible for setting up Retrofit and OkHttp clients with interceptors and authenticators for API communication, including mock backend, logging, authentication header attachment, and token refresh mechanisms.

classes.name: ApiClient
classes.description: A Kotlin class that configures and provides a Retrofit API client with support for mock backend, auth token handling, refresh, and logging.

methods.name: create
methods.description: Creates and configures an ApiClient instance with mock backend, auth interceptors, token refresh, and logging.

methods.name: loggingInterceptor
methods.description: Configures and returns an HttpLoggingInterceptor with BODY level logging for debugging.
